introSection: Valkyrie is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Gyeongju World in Gyeongju, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 9 October 2021.
fullText: Valkyrie is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Gyeongju World in Gyeongju, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 9 October 2021.
